## Type of Change

## Checklist

- [ ] `make test` passes locally
- [ ] New/changed code has corresponding tests
- [ ] README updated (if a new detector was added)
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:` …)
- [ ] No unrelated changes included
